Murielle, I want to walk you through our plans for next quarter. We are going to launch a new hiring initiative in March.
That sounds ambitious. What is the main objective?
Our objective is to reduce turnover, so we intend to improve the onboarding process.
Good. And what is the first step you are going to take?
First, I am going to draft the proposal this week. Then we are going to allocate more budget to the training team.
Are you going to rush the rollout, or is it going to be gradual?
I am not going to rush it. We anticipate a busy pipeline, so the rollout is going to be gradual and the expansion is going to follow the timeline.
Perfect. Send me the draft and I am going to review the timeline with you.
We are going to launch a new hiring initiative.
Our objective is to reduce turnover.

Hi Murielle, it's Marcus. I want to share our plans for the next quarter. We are going to launch a new hiring initiative in March, and we are going to allocate more budget to the training team. First, I am going to draft the proposal this week. Then, we are going to review the timeline with the directors. Our main objective is to reduce turnover, so we intend to improve the onboarding process. We anticipate a busy pipeline, but the rollout is going to be gradual. I am not going to rush it. I will send you the full plan on Monday. Talk soon.

Good morning, Murielle. This is Diana from London. I want to explain our upcoming plans. Next month, we are going to start a big expansion in the northern region. We intend to hire twenty new people, and we are going to allocate two managers to lead the project. Our objective is clear: we are going to grow the team without losing quality. I am going to prepare the first draft of the timeline tomorrow. Look at the sky, it is very dark, so I think it is going to rain during our kickoff event, but that will not stop us. I will call you after the meeting. Thank you.
